name: Spaghetti with Garlic and Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in olive oil.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 5 minutes on low heat.
3. Add wine and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Toss with pasta and garnish with parsley.
5. Serve hot with grated cheese on the side.
6. Serve with crusty bread and salad.
